# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<h1><%= @post.title %></h1>

<% if @post.image.present? %>
  <img src="<%= image_path(@post.image) %>" alt="Blog Post Image">
<% end %>

<p>
  <%= raw @post.content %>
</p>

<div class="tags">
  <% @post.tags.each do |tag| %>
    <%= link_to tag.name, blog_posts_path(tag: tag.name), class: "btn btn-sm" %>&nbsp;
  <% end %>
</div>

<h2>Comments:</h2>

<%= render partial: 'comments', locals: { post: @post } %>

<%= render partial: 'comment_form' %>
